root_text.an4.139:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco dhammakathiko appañca bhāsati asahitañca;
root_text.an4.139:1.4: parisā cassa na kusalā hoti sahitāsahitassa.
root_text.an4.139:1.5: Evarūpo, bhikkhave, dhammakathiko evarūpāya parisāya dhammakathikotveva saṅkhaṁ gacchati.
root_text.an4.139:2.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco dhammakathiko appañca bhāsati sahitañca;
root_text.an4.139:2.3: Evarūpo, bhikkhave, dhammakathiko evarūpāya parisāya dhammakathikotveva saṅkhaṁ gacchati.
root_text.an4.139:3.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco dhammakathiko bahuñca bhāsati asahitañca;
root_text.an4.139:3.2: parisā cassa na kusalā hoti sahitāsahitassa.
root_text.an4.139:3.3: Evarūpo, bhikkhave, dhammakathiko evarūpāya parisāya dhammakathikotveva saṅkhaṁ gacchati.
root_text.an4.139:4.1: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco dhammakathiko bahuñca bhāsati sahitañca;
root_text.an4.139:4.3: Evarūpo, bhikkhave, dhammakathiko evarūpāya parisāya dhammakathikotveva saṅkhaṁ gacchati.

translation_text.an4.139:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these four Dhamma speakers.
translation_text.an4.139:1.3: One Dhamma speaker speaks little and off topic.
translation_text.an4.139:1.4: And their assembly can’t tell what’s on topic and what’s off topic.
translation_text.an4.139:1.5: Such an assembly regards such a Dhamma speaker simply as a Dhamma speaker.
translation_text.an4.139:2.1: One Dhamma speaker speaks little but stays on topic.
translation_text.an4.139:2.2: And their assembly can tell what’s on topic and what’s off topic.
translation_text.an4.139:2.3: Such an assembly regards such a Dhamma speaker simply as a Dhamma speaker.
translation_text.an4.139:3.1: One Dhamma speaker speaks much but off topic.
translation_text.an4.139:3.2: And their assembly can’t tell what’s on topic and what’s off topic.
translation_text.an4.139:3.3: Such an assembly regards such a Dhamma speaker simply as a Dhamma speaker.
translation_text.an4.139:4.1: One Dhamma speaker speaks much and stays on topic.
translation_text.an4.139:4.2: And their assembly can tell what’s on topic and what’s off topic.
translation_text.an4.139:4.3: Such an assembly regards such a Dhamma speaker simply as a Dhamma speaker.
translation_text.an4.139:4.4: These are the four Dhamma speakers.”

variant_text.an4.139:1.4: parisā cassa → parisā ca (bj, sya-all, km, pts1ed)
